component.name: S.T.A.L.K.E.R. G.A.M.M.A.
component.summary: Install and play S.T.A.L.K.E.R. G.A.M.M.A. on Linux

description.p: Stalker-gamma-linux is the Linux integration layer for the S.T.A.L.K.E.R. G.A.M.M.A. modpack: it installs Anomaly, the GAMMA modlist, a shared Proton prefix and Mod Organizer 2 under Proton, then launches the game through MO2's USVFS so mods stay fully manageable — exactly like on Windows.
This application does not host or distribute the game, Anomaly, or any mod: everything is downloaded client-side from ModDB and GitHub, the same way the official GAMMA launcher does.
First packaged release: MVP install/update/play pipeline and the GTK4/libadwaita GUI.
